summary: Frontend testing of Space Orbit educational app - BUG FIX VERIFICATION. Critical bug fix confirmed: Explore page sliders and presets now update the 3D orbit visualization in real-time. All 11 orbit types are unlocked on Quiz and Learn pages. All features tested and working.

issues: THREE.Clock deprecation warning in console (non-blocking, cosmetic)

critical_code_review_comments: Bug fix verified: EarthScene.jsx lines 217-258 now properly detect parameter changes (semiMajor, eccentricity, inclination, raan, color, speed) and update orbit geometry/materials in-place
All 11 ORBIT_UNLOCK_THRESHOLDS correctly set to 0 in orbits.js
useProgress.js DEFAULT_PROGRESS includes all 11 orbits in unlockedOrbits array
Merged localStorage logic ensures new defaults always apply to existing users
context_for_next_testing_agent: All bug fixes verified working. Explore page sliders (Semi-Major Axis, Eccentricity, Inclination, RAAN, Speed) update both the orbital data table AND the 3D canvas in real-time. Preset buttons (LEO, GEO, HEO, Molniya, etc) load correct parameters and update the 3D scene. All 11 orbit types unlocked on Quiz page (all have START buttons), Learn page sidebar (all clickable), and Explore page presets (none disabled).

test_results.CRITICAL_slider_updates_3d_orbit: PASS - Semi-Major Axis slider moved from 3.0u to 9.4u, 3D orbit shape changed accordingly
test_results.CRITICAL_preset_buttons_update_sliders_a: PASS - Tested GEO (7.80u, 0.000 ecc), Molniya (6.80u, 0.740 ecc, 63.4° inc), LEO (2.45u, 0.001 ecc) - all update both sliders and 3D scene
test_results.explore_color_picker: PASS - 7 color options change orbit line, satellite, and glow color
test_results.explore_reset_button: PASS - Returns all parameters to defaults (3.0u, 0.10 ecc, 45° inc)
test_results.explore_gps_constellation_toggle: PASS - Shows 24 GPS satellites in 6 orbital planes without crash
test_results.explore_labels_toggle: PASS - Shows 'CUSTOM' label above satellite on orbit
test_results.quiz_page_11_orbits_unlocked: PASS - All 11 orbit types have START buttons (no lock overlays): LEO, Polar, GEO, SSO, MEO, HEO, Molniya, Tundra, Graveyard, Hohmann, L-Points
test_results.learn_page_sidebar_11_orbits: PASS - All 11 orbits clickable in sidebar (no lock icons)
test_results.learn_page_orbit_switching: PASS - Clicking GEO in sidebar updates 3D scene to show large equatorial circular orbit and lesson content
test_results.home_page_3d_earth_scene: PASS - 3D Earth with multiple colored orbits (cyan, red, yellow) and animated satellites with glow effects
test_results.live_data_ticker: PASS - Shows real satellite data (GOES-18: 35,786 km | 24 hr | 3.07 km/s)

bug_fix_verification.issue: Explore page sliders and presets were not updating the 3D orbit visualization
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: EarthScene.jsx sync only compared orbit IDs (line 217 had 'if (orbitMapRef.current[orbit.id]) return;'), never detected parameter changes for same-ID orbits
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Added in-place parameter update logic (lines 218-258) that detects changes in semiMajor, eccentricity, inclination, raan, color, speed and updates geometry/materials accordingly
bug_fix_verification.verification_method: Tested sliders (Semi-Major changed 3.0u→9.4u, orbit visually expanded) and presets (GEO, Molniya, LEO all changed both sliders and 3D scene)

unlock_verification.default_progress: All 11 orbits in unlockedOrbits array in useProgress.js
